description: A pencil or charcoal drawing depicting Saint Isaac's Cathedral in Saint Petersburg during a heavy snowfall. The massive domed cathedral rises in the background, partially obscured by driving snow rendered in diagonal hatching. In the foreground, a dark telephone booth or kiosk stands in deep snow, with a small figure atop it. The neoclassical colonnade of the cathedral is visible through the blizzard. The scene is rendered in monochrome grays and whites, creating a stark, atmospheric winter composition.

_meta.title: Saint Isaac's cathedral under the snow
